skill1.kitLine: Activates when using Burst Skill. Affects self.
skill1.note: burstCast trigger on self matches 'activates when using Burst Skill, affects self'

skill1.kitLine: Effects vary according to the number of times used. Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it.
skill1.note: escalating kind applies steps 1..N on activation N, matching the cumulative 'previous effects repeat' semantics

skill1.kitLine: Once: Marked Target 1 - Critical Rate ▲ 6.26% for 45 sec.
Twice: Marked Target 2 - Critical Damage ▲ 18.03% for 45 sec.
Three times: Marked Target 3 - ATK ▲ 17.28% for 45 sec.

skill2.kitLine: Affects 5 enemy unit(s) with the highest final DEF.
skill2.note: Multi-target selection collapsed to lone boss; documented in caveat as inert vs partless single boss. No functional difference in scope-lock.

skill2.kitLine: Deals 170.58% of final ATK as damage.
skill2.where: skill2[0] effects[0] dot atkPct:170.58 intervalSec:14.7 crit:true
skill2.note: Coefficient faithful to kit. Trigger is MEASURED time-based ~14.7s (solo probe 2026-07-16), not stated in kit text. crit:true opt-in per measured 3/11 crit fires (2026-07-17). Period unverified in team fights (caveat).

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies. Deals 149.85% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage.
burst.note: Base nuke fires every burst regardless of Marked Target phase. FB-exempt auto per P2 prior.

burst.kitLine: Effects vary for each stage of Marked Target. Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it.
burst.note: Second burstCast block with escalating steps mirrors S1 cumulative semantics, targeting enemy

burst.kitLine: Marked Target 1: Damage Taken ▲ 39.96% for 5 sec.
burst.note: Boss debuff, exact coefficient and duration

burst.kitLine: Marked Target 2: Deals 299.7% of final ATK as additional damage.
Marked Target 3: Deals 349.65% of final ATK as additional damage.
Affects all allies. Full Burst Duration ▼ 5 sec.
burst.note: Shortens FB window. Net rotation effect (shorter window vs faster re-cycle) flagged UNVERIFIED in caveat and note ⚑.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: kit targets 5 enemies with highest final DEF — modeled as lone boss (multi-target selection inert vs partless single boss)
documentedConfounds.why: Scope-lock is partless single boss; 5-target selection has zero mechanical effect. Pure simplification, no damage delta.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: ~14.7s period is a solo measurement (2026-07-16); whether the period holds in team fights is unverified
documentedConfounds.why: If the period changes in team play the rider tick count shifts, but solo validation (12 ticks/180s) matches. Only relevant for team boards.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: periodic hit crits in-game (MEASURED 3/11 fires, ×1.5 exactly) — modeled via per-DoT crit:true opt-in; global DOT_CRIT default stays OFF
documentedConfounds.why: crit:true is already enabled on this DoT. The ~4% solo gap from engine-global DOT_CRIT gating is documented in the note as the residual between sim 50.86M and real 55.28M. Known, quantified.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Full Burst Duration ▼ 5 sec — net rotation effect (shorter window vs faster re-cycle) is an unverified estimate
documentedConfounds.why: If the engine's rotation model mis-signs this (net harm instead of net benefit), it could shift burst timing for the whole team. Note explicitly says 'pull if it spuriously net-harms the board'. Needs /sim-battery diff.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1/burst: Marked Target stage modeled as permanent burst-use count — possible in-game 45s stage reset on expiry not modeled
documentedConfounds.why: At 40s burst CD the stage never expires in normal rotation (45s > 40s), so steady-state is correct. Only matters if burst spacing exceeds 45s (unusual in auto-play).

documentedConfounds.text: SG cadence tuple (pullsPerSec 1.5, reloadFrames 133, rolling-reload) all datamine-unreliable, ALWAYS-⚑
documentedConfounds.why: SG normal-attack cadence drives the majority of Isabel's damage. Datamine values may not match real fire rate; this is the primary uncertainty for any SG unit.

documentedConfounds.text: Isabel is HR-CLEAN (no Hit Rate in kit) but shared SG core bands are HR-contaminated from other units (G4)
documentedConfounds.why: Solo probe confirmed SG core bands HR-clean at HR=0 (NEAR matched pre-reg within 2%). Residual risk is from other units' contamination of the shared band table, not Isabel's own kit.

documentedConfounds.text: SG LANDING at range (mid/midfar/far read below engine table); totals stay moderate-confidence until corroborated
documentedConfounds.why: Range-dependent damage falloff for SG is not yet fully validated. Could shift normal-attack totals if the engine's range table is wrong for SG.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Isabel as a Marked-Target escalating kit: S1 is a burstCast-triggered escalating self-buff (critRate/critDmg/ATK, cumulative across burst uses), S2 is a measured time-based periodic rider (14.7s interval, 170.58% coefficient, crit-enabled per probe data), and burst is a three-block structure (base 149.85% nuke + escalating MT riders with damageTaken debuff and two flat-damage steps + fullBurstExtend:-5 for the FB shortening). All 8 kit lines are implemented; zero silent drops. The key approximations are: S2's trigger/period is inferred from solo measurement (not in kit text), the Marked-Target stage is a monotonic burst counter with no 45s reset, and fullBurstExtend:-5's net rotation sign is unverified. The author flags SG cadence and range-landing as the dominant remaining uncertainties.
